title: bihai metallica
intro: Bihai metallica, also known as Echinacea, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. Echinacea is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing the severity and duration of colds and flu, improving immune function, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. In herbal preparations, Echinacea is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, capsules, and tinctures to support overall health and well-being.
intro_study: According to "Biological trace element research", bihai metallica benefits include enhanced biocompatibility of essential elements such as Na, K, Ca, Mg, V, Mn, Fe, Cu, and Zn when taken in conjunction with milk, butter, honey, or ghee, thereby eliminating their harmful effects.
